The Process

Up and running in 48 hours

From application to your first sale — we handle the platform, you handle the play.

Step 1

Apply Online

Fill out a quick form. We confirm your campaign within 48 hours. No paperwork, no phone calls.

Click here to secure your dates
Step 2

Register Your Team

Each player's family registers online in seconds. Once your roster is in, your campaign launches automatically.

Step 3

Sell & Get Paid

Buyers order and pay online. We produce and deliver. You receive a cheque — no cash, no chasing, no stress.

What We Sell

Freeze-dried candy
your fans will love

Sport-specific products with names your team will be proud to sell. Delivered locally.

Hockey
Celly Crunches

Freeze-dried fruit chews transformed into an airy, explosive crunch. Named for the celebration — because every sale is worth celebrating.

The Dangle The Snipe The Hat Trick The Bar Down
Dance & Gymnastics
Backflip Bears

Freeze-dried gummy bears with an unmistakable snap. Light, bold, and impossible to put down — a crowd favourite at every recital and meet.

The Solo The Duo The Ensemble The Showstopper
Baseball
Moon Balls

Freeze-dried hard candy puffed into airy spheres — intense flavour locked inside a melt-on-your-tongue crunch. One bite and you get it.

The Single The Double The Triple The Home Run
How Bundles Work
More bags. Better value. More raised.

Every product comes in four bundle sizes. Buyers choose how many bags they want — and the more they buy, the more they save. That means bigger orders, higher average transactions, and more money in your team's pocket at the end of the campaign.

3 bags
Starter
5 bags
Popular
7 bags
Best Value ✦
10 bags
Max Savings

Bigger bundles = more savings per bag for the buyer, more raised per order for your team.

About Us

Built for local teams,
by someone who gets it.

Sweet Success Fundraising was built to solve a real problem — teams spending more time collecting cash than raising it.

Locally Based

Production and fulfillment happens in your community. Delivery happens here. Your cheque comes from here.

Zero Cash Handling

Every transaction is online and paid instantly. No floats, no change, no missing money.

Fully Automated

From registration to daily leaderboards to final payout — the platform runs itself.

The sweetest way to fund your season.

Freeze-dried treats are one of the fastest growing snack categories in North America. They're novel, shareable, and genuinely delicious — which means your team has something people actually want to buy.

We handle production using commercial-grade equipment, package everything by order, and ship directly. Your team organizer distributes to players at the next practice or game.

No inventory risk. No upfront cost. No minimum orders. Just a straightforward split — and a product your community will talk about.

Proudly serving local sports, groups & activities
